name: Pop Frenzy Cannon Blast
description: Pop Frenzy: Cannon Blast is an addictive bubble shooter game! Aim your cannon and match 3 or more bubbles of the same color to pop them. Features 5 special cannon powers (Laser, Freeze, Storm, Multi, Void), 8 stunning worlds, boss levels every 5 stages, daily missions, 6 unlockable skins, weekly ranking and daily login rewards. How far can you go?
instructions: Mouse or touch to aim and shoot Click or tap to fire the cannon Tap power buttons to activate special abilities
